Name: Namie
Description: Namie has joined The Loners, despite being created by their enemy Fujikawa Industries. She at first didn't know what she is, thinking she was a normal girl, when she is anything but. She has yet to demonstrate most of the previous Red Ronin's powers, but she can produce a red energy blade at will.
